max_cover: Equal to base sum assured, max Rs. 2 crore
premium_cap: Rider premium max 30% of base premium (IRDAI cap)
key_terms: Pays additional sum assured on death due to accident within 180 days of the accident

max_cover: Max Rs. 50 lakh, capped at base sum assured
premium_cap: Rider premium max 30% of base premium (IRDAI cap)

premium_cap: Rider premium approx. 3-5% of base premium
key_terms: Future premiums waived on diagnosis of total permanent disability or specified critical illness of the policyholder

max_cover: Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 5,000 per day of hospitalization

max_cover: Not applicable (returns premiums, not a cover amount)
